title: enallagma obovata
intro: Enallagma obovata, also known as the variegated fritillary, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Enallagma obovata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine.
